# Useful Datasets


Here we can provide a description of useful datasets.

## SPICE

The SPICE dataset contains low and high-energy samples of drug-like molecules
and peptides {cite}`eastmanSPICEDatasetDruglike2023`.

```{note}
Support is [implemented](datasets/spice)
```
